zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham於1425年8月出生在英國英格蘭肯特金斯頓時，她的父親Talran Tatesham Esq.25歲，母親Alice McCoy20歲。她於大約1445年與Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1489年10月12日在英國英格蘭肯特萊坦享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特馬林。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham was born in August 1425, in Kingston, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Talran Tatesham Esq., was 25 and her mother, Alice McCoy, was 20. She married Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer about 1445, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 12 October 1489, in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Malling, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.All Saints, Northampton, Northamptonshir: All Saints' Church, Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham est née en août 1425, à Kingston, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Talran Tatesham Esq., avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice McCoy, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer environ 1445, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 octobre 1489, à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Malling, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.All Saints, Northampton, Northamptonshir: All Saints' Church, Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham im August 1425 in Kingston, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Talran Tatesham Esq. 25 und ihre Mutter Alice McCoy 20. Sie hat um 1445 in Kent, England Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Oktober 1489 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Malling, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham è nata il nel agosto 1425 nel Kingston, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Talran Tatesham Esq., aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Alice McCoy, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer circa 1445, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 12 ottobre 1489, nel Wrotham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Malling, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.All Saints, Northampton, Northamptonshir: 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴 앨 세인츠' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham(이)가 1425년 8월 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 킨그스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Talran Tatesham Esq.(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice McCoy(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1445년 영국 켄트에서 Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1489년 10월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 로섬에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 맬링에 묻혔다.

pt.All Saints, Northampton, Northamptonshir: All Saints' Church, Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham nasceu em agosto de 1425, em Kingston, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Talran Tatesham Esq., tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alice McCoy, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer aproximadamente 1445, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1489, em Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Malling, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.All Saints, Northampton, Northamptonshir: алл сеинц' чурч, нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham родилась август 1425 г. в местности кингстон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Talran Tatesham Esq. было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice McCoy, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer около 1445 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 12 октября 1489 г. в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности маллинг, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice Elizabeth Tatesham nació en agosto de 1425, en Kingston, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Talran Tatesham Esq., tenía 25 años y su mamá, Alice McCoy, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir John Clark II, Baron of the Exchequer aproximadamente 1445, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1489, en Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Malling, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
